description: Claude Code skill definition (stored as .claude/skills/<skill-id>/SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter)

skillId.title: Skill ID
skillId.description: Unique slug identifier for this skill (lowercase, hyphens, numbers only)

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable display name for this skill

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional description of what this skill does

userInvocable.title: User Invocable
userInvocable.description: Whether this skill can be invoked as a /command from the CLI

allowedTools.title: Allowed Tools
allowedTools.description: Tools this skill is allowed to use. Empty means all tools are available.

model.title: Model Override
model.description: Override the default model for this skill

argumentHint.title: Argument Hint
argumentHint.description: Hint text displayed to users when they invoke this skill (e.g. <file-path>)

content.title: Content
content.description: The skill's prompt template and instructions (markdown)
